package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for route_setup_scattered_without_router_package: Route registration split across unrelated files without a clear `router`, `routes`, or `transport` home.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule153NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule153NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule153NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario153Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule153NegativeService, input Rule153NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
